emergency_stop_available.note: Emergency stop circuit must be installed and tested before any real movement

collision_check_available.note: Collision detection (lidar, ultrasonic, or bumper sensors) required

human_distance_check_available.note: Human proximity detection required for safe operation near people

battery_check_available.note: Battery voltage monitoring required to prevent low-power runaway

command_speed_limit.note: Speed limited to 0.5 m/s in simulation, must be enforced in real mode

movement_zone_defined.note: Physical movement boundaries must be configured

real_hardware_config_present.note: Real hardware configuration file must exist and be validated

simulation_passed.note: Simulation log exists with recorded runs

manual_owner_approval_required.note: Human owner must explicitly approve real robot operation

decision: BLOCKED — physical movement requires all safety checks to pass
unblock_requirements: Install and test emergency stop hardware
note: v071 defines the safety spine. Real robot movement requires all checks to pass.
